## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss keyword research strategies and tools for SentinelOne account](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katya developed a post-processing system for editing that breaks tasks into phases, improving efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [SentinelOne has an overwhelming amount of CS101 content (3000+ articles), much of which isn't performing well](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Sydney shared techniques for efficiently pulling keyword data using Google Search Console and Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Opportunities identified for content refreshes and new angles on existing topics](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Topics

### Editing Process Improvements

  - [Katya halved her editing time compared to week 2](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Developed a phased post-processing system using Claude AI](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [System progresses from structural edits to more granular changes](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Includes keyword review at the end](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### Keyword Research Challenges

  - [Katya struggling with manual keyword analysis for SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Cross-referencing existing content with competitor keywords is time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Many SentinelOne articles not ranking for relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Identified need for more efficient research methods](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### Google Search Console Technique

  - [Sydney demonstrated using Search Analytics for Sheets extension](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Pulls URL and ranking query data (up to 25,000 rows)](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Groups keywords by page and query, unlike standard Search Console export](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Can be set to update daily or monthly](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

### Google Analytics for Content Titles

  - [Sydney showed how to pull page titles and URLs from Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Useful for cross-referencing existing content with keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Exported 4,400+ pages of SentinelOne content](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Content Refresh Opportunities

  - [Initial plans for content refreshes were delayed due to approval issues](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Shifted focus to new CS101 articles](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Opportunity to revisit refresh strategy with client](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Katya focusing on CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks content](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Identified Fortinet as another key competitor to analyze](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Looking for ways to efficiently scrape competitor article titles](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### SentinelOne Content Strategy

  - [Currently working on 3 main content pillars](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Potential to expand to other topic areas within CS101](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Need to confirm with client about broadening content focus](https://fathom.video/share/x1Tk8szs_dxouWBWhcW5Czzf5WmcXzSJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
